subcodes.first_line: O My leaf, O My handmaiden! The Lord of Names maketh mention of thee from amidst tribulation, that He may draw thee unto a station decreed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی یا امتی یذکرک مالک الاسما فی بحبوحه البلاء لیجذبک الی مقام رقم من
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
